description: I actually believe that WYSIWYG Web Builder is one of the top 3 web design applications on the market today. It is packed with features, extensions and components to allow a competent designer to build just about any website they wish. It is fast and responsive and above all else, stable. I first used this package as a replacement for Antenna as my go-to tool for web site generation and happily used it for several years. One of my few very minor criticisms of this application is that due to the vast number of third party extensions available, I find I spend a significant amount of time reviewing what is new (which is a problem with me not the software) and have less time to actually use it. I would most definitely recommend this package as a superb design tool, which at the price point Pablo Soft market it makes it massive value for money.
author: Kevin T.
pros: The number of design components (Addons and Plugins) available to support the software. There is a huge user community who make available the multitude of design components which they have crafted mostly for free. This extends the capability of the package immeasurably.
cons: The user interface for WYSIWYG Web Builder whilst very comprehensive can be a little daunting for new users. There are many panels, plus the ribbon which for a new user could be a little confusing. That said I am certain a competent designer will not take long to become familiar with the interface. As it is not my current go-to web design tool I always have to remind myself when maintaining sites created in the package, just where things are.

review_title: Most affordable and deep web design software money can buy!
description: I have used this software since version 10 and the continual updates and functionality being added to the software over the years is fantastic. When compared to other software on the market is by far one of the cheapest for what it offers. Others on here who say it is expensive ($39??? expensive?) and doesnt offer support is crazy. When the creator of the software has personally looked at one of your projects to help you out, you know you are getting top notch service. Try getting that from Microsoft or Adobe. Ain't going to happen.
author: Ron W.
pros: This software is very deep in what it offers. As with any software, there is a learning curve but beginners will find it easy to build something using the drag and drop system and at the same time advanced users will be able to unleash the power it has to create some very stunning sites. There are hundreds of add-on extensions (many which are free) that allow you to create some amazing effects with little effort. There is an active forum to get help and the software developer himself constantly offers help. Where else can you find the creator of the software taking time out to help? Nowhere! The software is also constantly being updated (not only to fix any bugs) but adding new functionality to it. Again, you may have to wait 6 months to a year or longer to get other companies to fix and/or update the software!
cons: I cannot think of anything that I would consider a con of the software. No software is perfect and 100% of everything someone needs but this comes darn close to it.

review_title: Stepping stone towards perfect web designer
description: Anyone who has the desire to learn coding this serves as stepping stone .When done with design you can can view source code that turn to code learning.
author: Wisani E W.
pros: I managed to create site that are even now are still hosted and their function are still serving the purpose . Its also editable without loading the software to edit with.
cons: They don't have rich library when comes to templates and most probable responsive once that will respond to the users appeal.

description: This is one of the most amazing products I have used in my 35 years as a technology specialist. The products is stable, flexible and just well designed. Support is far better than any other software product I use regularly. All this for a price that should be several times hight than it is.
author: Eric L.
pros: WYSIWYG Web Builder provides a graphical design tool for creating industry standard HTML and CSS code for websites. A user does not have to know any HTML or CSS code to build a nice website. For those that know a little coding the tools provides additional flexibility not found in other WYSIWYG builders. The tool is a Windows appliction for creating your website and then uploading the code to the hosting compnay of your choice. This is not a WordPress type tool where everything is done online. I started with version 14 and am using the newely released version 16. The product includes tools and extensions to build web pages, create forms, create blogs, interface with data in mysql, csv, and Access, use a simple CMS to allow users to use an online dashboard to edit specific sections of a website page. You can easily integrate third party PHP scripts (I use PHPJabbers scripts) into your website to add functionality like; blogs, CMS, eCommerce, Appointment Scheduling, User ratings and Reviews, etc. Support is unlike any product that I use. Support is provided via a Forum where expert advice is provided by fellow users. However, the developer usually respondes to post within 36 hours. The price for the software is about $60 with updates included and new releases at a 50% discount. Updates are frequent with new enhancements as well as fixes. These is a fully functional demo of the product available for download.
cons: For me the biggest challenge when I made the switch to WYSIWYG Web Builder was the vast selection of tools and extensions available. I am still discovering tools I wasn't aware of after 2 years. You can learn enough to get started with the basics by reading the online tutorials and there are plenty of YouTube videos on the product.

review_title: WYSIWYG Web Builder is an outstanding website development application
description: WYSIWYG Web Builder is an amazing product. About 5 years ago I exhaustively searched the Internet for an application to design websites that provided visual design, and generated code with few or no limitations. Web Builder is that application. It can do ANYTHING anyone could want or need when developing websites.
author: Michael L.
pros: Fixed and fluid website design, login and CMS capability, many layout features, robust user group and outstanding aggressive development that stays on the bleeding edge of what is possible. Web Builder provides hundreds of extensions/widgets, and makes it possible to add custom code ANYWHERE in your website. Possibilities are limitless. Additionally Web Builder is an outstanding tool for a more novice user and an advanced developer. It makes website development fairly easy and fast without sacrificing power and capability ─ it has no equal.
cons: User manual needs refinement. The application provides so much capability that it can be difficult to decide how to proceed.

author: Manuel Z.
pros: The simplicity's to work and the easy learning to use
cons: One of the important missing the ecommerce from the software

review_title: Amazing tool for beginners and people that like websites their way
description: Having a great software to build website easily. The name means what the product does, what you see is what you get, you drag and drop things and that is how the website will end up looking. The only one that was similar was yahoo website builder. I have yet to find something like this.
author: Nathan R.
pros: So simple to use, a real drag and drop. It is not easy to find a software to make websites that would make it so easy to have the exact design that you want without having to code. You literally drag things around with the mouse and position them where you want. So you can have great visual designs without having to compromise. It is extremely good for beginners.
cons: The code ends up being very long and complex (not that a regular user would care about that). That doesn't mean it is a bad thing, it just means that there is a lot of code (not good, not bad). There is a learning curve in order to understand how to build an amazing website piece by piece, but the result is worth it.

review_title: My Favorite Website Design software ever! Well worth every dollar!!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I Really LOVE this software, it was easy to install and easy to get up and learning website design in no time. It has lots of sample site templates available including more for download. It is a WYSIWYG type program so for website builders New or experienced this software is easy to get using. It has FTP built into it, so you can easily upload your design changes directly to your server or store on your system for upload later.
cons: I honestly can not think of anything I do not like about this software, I found it really easy to install and get up and using. This is nice because so many programs are confusing for new website builders.

review_title: Best Website builder for professional, good looking large websites
description: (1) We completed 7 large, 50+ page websites with this software and SEO impact was strong (2) software is robust and bug-free
author: Haresh K.
pros: (1) Ease of use (2) high flexibility (3) built for scale (4) Many presentable templates
cons: (1) Takes time to get accustomed to (2) Software support could be a bit faster

description: Overall experience is very good. Software is good then other alternatives and also plus point for a perpetual license system instead of a subscription. Hoping for a good responsive website support in future versions.
author: Surya P.
pros: It's drag and drop support is better than other software's as it provides you freedom to move elements easily. It also provides better website customization because the output code is readable and we can add out own scripts and extensions.
cons: Features to create a responsive website need more work and need to be polished. I face difficulty in making responsive websites. Also, the basic add-ons/extensions prices are little higher.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Zeer slechte ervaring met de support. Geen email support vind ik erg verdacht
author: Stephane F.
cons: Geen mogelijkheid tot relatieve afmetingen zoals %, em en rem. Als je een account aanmaakt wordt je meteen geblokkeerd. Wil je een nieuw wachtwoord aanvragen geen email terug. Geen enkele mogelijkheid tot email support wat nogal verdacht is. Bij een nieuwe windows update werkt plots het programma niet meer en heb je geen enkele mogelijkheid om je activatie opnieuw in te voeren ook bij het verwijderen en daarna terug installeren geen enkele mogelijkheid tot het activatiescherm. Dus de help support ronduit slecht echt geen aanrader

description: 10 out of 10 experience. Love this software for creating websites.
author: Corina B.
pros: WYSIWYG Web Builder is very easy to use, once you learn the basics of it. There are a lot of great tutorials online to help get you started. If you've used any desktop publishing software (like Adobe InDesign), you sholud be able to learn to use this software in a timely manor.
cons: Embeding videos can be tricky for me at times but I think I just need to read up on the how-to info a bit more.

review_title: WYSIWYG is the best website developing software you should try right now!
description: I haven't learned anything about coding but I was able to create web pages and upload it in the internet. using their ftp feature (file transfer protocol) WYSIWYG webbuilder is the best offline website development tool.
author: Ibrahim A.
pros: Makes the processes of website development very easy due to drag and drop features, no need of coding skills has a lot of website developing features which makes it very enjoyable and addictive.
cons: Its very expensive, when the trial version expires normally its free to use for 30 days then you have to pay per feature depending on your plan, users can pay up to $ 39 for certain features.

description: I use WYSIWYG Web Builder for most websites and love it. It has tons of controls and is a great editor. I love programming with it and using responsive blocks is both easy and fun to 'build' a website with.
author: Mike F.
pros: Responsive website software with tons of features and options. Very customizable and powerful. Can do blocks or WYSIWYG sites. Has powerful backend admin features.
cons: Could be slightly more reliable. Missing some effects that other like software has or could be easier to implement.

description: We've been using WebBuilder for several years, since Version 6 I believe. It is not only easy to use and build a website, but it has many features that allow you integrate pretty much any kind of web software. There is no real limit as to what you can do.
author: Ray R.
pros: It is easy to use and you can publish just one page instead of the entire site, and there are several ways to publish. You can also test with different web browsers easily. You can also make responsive or mobile web pages.
cons: You really have to study to get the responsive and/or mobile pages to work.. but that's just about anything.

description: Can create usable websites with not too much effort. However, more sophisticated website development is not easy at all. However, it can be done by trial and error. Copying existing websites may or may not work,
author: Jay H.
pros: Easy to use within its limitations
cons: Multi-page websites produce code with the wrong file name for the Apache web server (very common) . A single page website produces a file named index.html, whereas a multi-page website produces main.html instead. This is incompatible with standard Apache web server software. The upgrade to 11 does not support websites built with the previous version 10. Support is almost non-existent. This is a major negative,

description: Un peu déçu par la durée de la version d évaluation et aussi par le manque de renseignements sur l achat des versions complètes. La WYSIWYG 15 WB si quelques un peut me fournir un lien où l acheter.
author: Ondobo ndjana M.
pros: Le visuel et la simplicité de la manipulation
cons: Les prix pour les version approfondies utilisant les console

author: Olivia F.
pros: It has tons of features. If you can think of it, there is probably some way to make it happen in this software.
cons: Can be a little redundant. There are multiple ways to accomplish almost any task. Usually an easy way and a harder way. I highly suggest doing some research before you just jump in and try to figure it out. (Just because your way of doing something works doesn't mean it's the most efficient way to do it.)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: For me it´s a moderate web builder
author: Marcel K.
pros: - you don´t must learn html or other web codes to make a good webpage - but you can use html or other web codes too
cons: - i thougt it is good for beginner but i didn´t good handle it - the elements are a little bit old-fashioned
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Whenever I post a question to their forum the answer is that my supplier URL is blocked by the admin's antivirus and he says please supply a safe url.. The url is 100% safe but he does not want to help Before paying your money on this tool be aware of this
author: Madi M.
